moat_analysis.details: Mixed ROIC: >15% in only 3/10 periods; Strong pricing power: Gross margins consistently improving; High capital requirements: Avg capex 10.1% of revenue; Invests in R&D, building intellectual property; Significant goodwill/intangible assets, suggesting brand value or IP

management_analysis.details: Excellent cash conversion: FCF/NI ratio of 1.30; Conservative debt management: D/E ratio of 0.07; Prudent cash management: Cash/Revenue ratio of 0.19; No insider trading data available; Moderate share count increase over time

predictability_analysis.details: Moderately predictable revenue: 7.9% avg growth with some volatility; Highly predictable operations: Operating income positive in all periods; Moderately predictable margins: 11.2% avg with some volatility; Highly predictable cash generation: Positive FCF in all periods

valuation_analysis.details: Expensive: Only 0.3% FCF yield; Expensive: 96.1% premium to reasonable value; Declining FCF trend is concerning
